raw_consumer_statement:
Im hoping you can help me with an issue Ive had with the way Citi handled a dispute I filed. I had purchased an AR upper and three magazines from XXXX XXXX XXXX. The upper didnt work, so I couldnt test the magazines. I requested a replacement, but that one also failed, so I returned the entire order and asked for a refund. 

XXXX XXXX initially only offered me store credit for the full purchase. After I filed the dispute, they refunded {$83.00} to my card for the magazines, but the {$240.00} for the upper was still left as store credit. Later, that credit was taken away entirely, and I never received a refund for the upper I returned. 

Despite this, Citi closed the dispute in XXXX XXXX favor because they showed a refund. Unfortunately, no one from Citi reached out to confirm the details with me, and I was not given the chance to provide the documentation I had ready. In effect, Citi accepted XXXX XXXX claim at face value without verifying my side, leaving me out {$240.00} for a returned product. 

I'm very disappointed with how this was handled and Id be very grateful if you could have them review this again and help me recover the {$240.00} that was never refunded. Im more than happy to provide any documentation that would help clarify the situation.
